channel.title: Posts on My adventures and other stuff
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on My adventures and other stuff

item.title: Plant box: Part #1
item.description: Preface Today I would like to write about a useless project that I am working on. Do you know the struggle to water your plants on time? For me this was the reason to not have these handy carbon dioxide to oxide converters, as I want to spare them the missery. However, back in december I was celebrating the “beun” version of Sinterklaas (Sinterbeun) with some friends of mine. The idea was to give each other a beun project as a gift.

item.title: Why A Blog
item.description: A year has 365.25 days or 8766 hours on average. This is a lot of time that can be used for all kind of things. I don’t know about you, but I lose track of most of the things that I actually pursue on a long term. From now on, I would like to write about things that I do or interest me. I hope that over time, this page gets full of all kind of things that I can look back to.
